title: 'Won't be nuked, think of it, Bibi': Trump reveals how he convinced Netanyahu for Iran-US deal
summary_full: US President Donald Trump declared a new peace deal with Tehran safeguards Israel from a nuclear threat, a claim made at the G7 summit. He asserted the agreement addresses Israel's primary existential concern, despite reports of Israeli opposition and critical media commentary. Trump also voiced criticism of Netanyahu's regional conduct.
